steps.title: Follow the present-tense pattern
steps.content: The sentence states general facts in present tense: the languages have a difference, one is object-oriented, and both require technical knowledge. The blank should continue that same general present-time pattern.

steps.title: Reject tense shifts
steps.content: B shifts to simple past, C to past perfect, and D to past progressive. None fits the surrounding timeless present-tense statements. The answer is A.
